name: Happy Penguin
subject: animals/penguin
prompt: a cheerful round cartoon penguin standing facing forward, a plump white belly, dark back and head, two little flippers held out at its sides, webbed feet, a small triangular beak and big friendly eyes

name: Emperor Penguin
subject: animals/penguin
prompt: a tall stately Emperor penguin standing in profile, a smooth rounded body, a curved patch of color around the side of its neck, a long slender beak, flippers tucked close, standing proudly upright

name: Baby Penguin Chick
subject: animals/penguin
prompt: a tiny fluffy baby penguin chick with a round fuzzy body, a soft downy texture, oversized sparkly eyes, a small beak, stubby flippers, and short legs, looking adorable and a little wobbly

name: Penguin Family
subject: animals/penguin
prompt: two tall parent penguins standing side by side with a small fluffy chick between them, the parents leaning their heads gently toward the baby, all with warm happy expressions on a patch of snow

name: Swimming Penguin
subject: animals/penguin
prompt: a sleek penguin diving and gliding through water with flippers swept back like wings, body stretched out and streamlined, a few bubbles trailing behind it and gentle wavy water lines around it

name: Sliding Penguin
subject: animals/penguin
prompt: a playful penguin sliding on its belly down a snowy slope, flippers pushed back, feet kicking up, a big delighted grin, with small lines and little snow puffs showing the speedy slide

name: Penguin on an Iceberg
subject: animals/penguin
prompt: a penguin standing on top of a chunky floating iceberg, calm water with gentle ripples below, a couple of distant snowy peaks behind, and a few small floating ice chunks nearby

name: Waddling Penguin
subject: animals/penguin
prompt: a chubby penguin caught mid-waddle as it walks, body tilted slightly, one foot lifted forward, flippers swung out for balance, a cheerful tipped-up beak and a bouncy happy posture

name: Penguin Portrait
subject: animals/penguin
prompt: a close-up head and shoulders portrait of a penguin facing forward, showing detailed feather texture around the face, big shiny eyes, a smooth beak with a soft highlight, and a curved feather pattern across the chest

name: Penguin Colony
subject: animals/penguin
prompt: a group of several penguins huddled close together in a colony, some facing different directions, a couple of small chicks among them, all standing close to share warmth on a snowy plain

name: Penguin with a Fish
subject: animals/penguin
prompt: a happy penguin standing and holding a fish in its beak, head tilted proudly, flippers out to the sides, a satisfied expression, with a small splash of water near its feet

name: Penguin in a Winter Hat
subject: animals/penguin
prompt: a cute cartoon penguin wearing a cozy knitted winter hat with a fluffy pom-pom and a long striped scarf wrapped around its neck, flippers raised happily, a couple of falling snowflakes around it
